allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; import glob; errors=[]; [errors.append\(f\) for f in glob.glob\('je_api_testka/**/*.py', recursive=True\) if not f.startswith\('je_api_testka/gui/main'\) for _ in [None] if \(lambda: \(ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\), True\)\)\(\) or False]")
Bash(python3 -c "import py_compile, glob; [print\(f'OK: {f}'\) if py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\) else None for f in sorted\(glob.glob\('je_api_testka/**/*.py', recursive=True\)\)]")
Bash(py -c "import py_compile, glob; [print\(f'OK: {f}'\) if py_compile.compile\(f, doraise=True\) else None for f in sorted\(glob.glob\('je_api_testka/**/*.py', recursive=True\)\)]")
